title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and multiple injuries.
charlotte_impact: Highlights rising gun violence concerns and the need for community safety measures in public spaces.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation and technical expertise in polymer science within the Charlotte region.

title: CMPD Chief Focuses on Internal Department Strength
summary: CMPD Chief Estella Patterson aims to strengthen the department internally for a safer Charlotte.

title: Huntersville Police Investigate Fatal Shooting
summary: Huntersville Police are investigating the fatal shooting of a 20-year-old Charlotte man.

title: Charlotte Faces Worst Drought in 20 Years
summary: Charlotte is experiencing its worst drought in nearly 20 years, impacting lawns and trees, with mandatory water conservation looming.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about environmental challenges and the need for sustainable water management.

title: School Bus Crash in West Charlotte Hospitalizes One

title: Defunct NASCAR Team Faces Lawsuit

title: Charles McNeair Released After 46 Years in Prison

title: Sunny Weather Expected, Rain Chances Thursday
summary: The forecast predicts sunny weather with temperatures in the 80s, with rain chances increasing on Thursday.

title: CMS BOE Reviews Superintendent's Budget Recommendations
